author: framework
rationale: Weak baseline deterministic demo with rough language and vague planning.

author: proposer
rationale: Switch to a more robust ASR path and a SOAP-style stronger note model to recover missed clinical details and produce cleaner chart structure on choppy audio.

diff.description: Whisper plus SOAP note generation with balanced cleanup for fragmented recordings.

author: proposer
rationale: Keep the current ASR family but reduce over-aggressive preprocessing and ask for a more detailed note to improve completeness without changing too many components at once.

diff.description: Parakeet with gentler preprocessing and detailed note prompting for better completeness.

author: proposer
rationale: Test whether better transcription alone carries most of the gain by changing ASR and preprocessing while keeping generation relatively lightweight and brief.

diff.description: Whisper-first lightweight note variant emphasizing transcript recovery over prompt expansion.

author: proposer
rationale: Swap to parakeet and tighten preprocessing to reduce stray multilingual fragments, transcript leakage, and awkward note wording caused by noisy spans.

author: proposer
rationale: Keep the stronger Whisper baseline but shift generation toward fuller chart-ready capture by preserving more quiet context and using a more complete note style.

author: proposer
rationale: Test parakeet with recall-friendly cleanup and a detailed note style to improve allergy, vitals, and return-precaution capture without enhancement artifacts.

author: proposer
rationale: Switching ASR to parakeet while tightening cleanup and using a SOAP-oriented prompt directly targets transcript leakage, fragmented multilingual artifacts, and weak section completeness.

author: proposer
rationale: Keeping whisper but shifting the generator toward a stricter SOAP structure with stronger preprocessing should test whether the main issue is formatting discipline and cleanup rather than the ASR backbone.

author: proposer
rationale: This variant isolates ASR impact with a lighter prompt change, aiming to preserve rich detail while reducing omissions from fragmented recognition through parakeet plus slightly stricter turn detection.

author: proposer
rationale: Swap to the alternate ASR path and ease preprocessing slightly to reduce transcript-artifact leakage while preserving low-volume clinical details such as meds, allergies, and return precautions.

author: proposer
rationale: Keep the stronger generator model but move from SOAP to a more detailed note style so the note is less templated and more likely to retain full negatives, vitals, allergy context, and explicit precautions.

author: proposer
rationale: Test whether tighter speech segmentation with the same high-capability note model improves factual extraction and removes stray foreign-language fragments without changing the overall SOAP framing.

author: proposer
rationale: Switch to whisper for potentially cleaner medical transcription and pair it with a more complete note prompt to improve factual capture, return precautions, and removal of transcript leakage.

diff.description: Whisper transcription with a detailed clinical note prompt to improve completeness and reduce transcript leakage.

author: proposer
rationale: Keep the stronger parakeet baseline but make preprocessing more assertive so fragmented or stray language tokens are cleaned up before note generation, while using a detailed prompt to preserve specific follow-up guidance.

diff.description: Parakeet with stronger cleanup and a detailed note prompt for cleaner, more complete follow-up notes.

author: proposer
rationale: Test whether whisper benefits from lighter preprocessing so clinically important details like meds, allergies, negatives, and vitals are not over-pruned, while staying in SOAP format for chart-ready structure.

diff.description: Whisper with lighter preprocessing and SOAP formatting to preserve detail while reducing cleanup-induced omissions.
